name: Couchbase, Inc.
description: Couchbase, Inc. provides a modern cloud database platform that offers a versatile, high-performance, and scalable NoSQL database. The company's platform, Couchbase Capella, is a fully managed database-as-a-service (DBaaS) that combines the strengths of SQL with the flexibility of a JSON schema. Couchbase enables developers and enterprises to build, deploy, and run mission-critical applications across cloud, mobile, and edge environments, delivering high performance at scale.
